pre_existing_failures.note: All 25 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to this story's scope: icon-set resolution mismatches (e.g. 'lucide:phone' vs expected 'ph:phone-bold') in tests/unit/components/ThemeIcon.test.ts and tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts, stemming from the watercolor theme-set landing (commit a50edf4, predates this epic). No file touched by this story is involved. Treated as pre-existing debt this story did not introduce. Matches stories S01-S07's recorded baseline note exactly (same 25 failures, same root cause). Baseline total (2985) equals S07's recorded final count exactly, as expected for the epic's last sequential story.

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one. Treated as NO_LINT baseline, not a failure. Matches S01-S07's recorded baseline.

typecheck.detail: Production src typecheck is clean. Note: tsconfig.json's own "exclude" list excludes the entire tests/ directory (pre-existing project convention, predates this story) — the new/edited e2e spec files under app/tests/e2e/ are therefore not covered by this command at all. See result.json for the ad hoc scoped tsc check performed against the new e2e files specifically.
